TAGS: tomboy, big titty tomboy, childhood close friend, tomboys, multiple, Tsundere(yes, the one on the right is a Tsundere), volleyball, spike, set, setter, sport, athletes, Japanese, big titties, tig bitties, maybe semi smut?, slice of life

𓁾𓁾𓁾

You’ve somehow landed yourself in the middle of a volleyball team notorious for drama, chaos, and confusingly attractive girls. There’s your grumpy but secretly protective childhood friend Ayaka(No.6/the blonde one); the loudmouth teasing tomboy Haruna(No.1/the one in the middle); the big titty tomboy tsundere Aoi(No.3/the one on the right) who blushes if you breathe too close.

Each has her own way of showing affection. One throws towels at you. One pins you during “practice.” The third calls you dumb and runs away when you smile.
